description: Controlled vocabulary for tags applied to analysis records and extraction journal entries. See .claude/skills/shared/CONVENTIONS.md §14 for rules.

categories.domain: Problem space or field (e.g., knowledge-management, security)
categories.technology: Concrete tech, tools, or protocols (e.g., react, mcp, sqlite)
categories.concept: Named ideas or abstractions (e.g., multi-agent, rag)
categories.pattern: Architectural/design patterns with replicable shape (e.g., plugin-dispatch)
categories.taxonomic: Artifact type (e.g., framework, library) — use sparingly
